data.title: Apple Rival Samsung To Unfold 'Special Edition' Of Its Latest Flagship Foldable Phone
data.description: Samsung is reportedly set to unveil its "Special Edition" Galaxy Z Fold 6 on Oct. 25, after initial delays.

data.title: YouTube's 'Premium Lite' Plan That Removes Some Ads, But Doesn't Offer Any Other Perks Is Rolling Out To More Countries
data.description: YouTube is expanding its "Premium Lite" plan, which offers fewer ads at a lower price than the standard Premium subscription, to more countries including Australia and Germany.

data.title: Amid Nvidia's Stratospheric Rally, Billionaire Investor Druckenmiller Regrets Cashing Out Of AI Stalwart's Stock: 'I'm Licking My Wounds From A Bad Sale'
data.description: Nvidia has been an excellent bet for those who reposed faith in the company to make it big amid the AI craze.

data.title: Elon Musk Mourned Tesla's Lack Of Market Share In Japan In January; EV Giant Now Opens 600th Supercharger Post In Country
data.description: Tesla has opened a supercharger station at Enshu Morimachi in the town of Mori, Shizuoka Prefecture in Japan that includes its 60,000th supercharger post around the world, the company said on Wednesday.

data.title: Disney Crowds Getting You Down? Now You Can Get Ahead Of The Queue For A Mere $449
data.description: The Walt Disney Co. is launching a new pass designed to streamline ride access at its U.S. theme parks. The Lightning Lane Premier Pass will be available starting Oct. 23 at Disneyland and Oct. 30 at Disney World.
